title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.310 - Training school for nurses
text:
205.310.  Training school for nurses. — The board of trustees of such county public hospital may establish and maintain in connection therewith and as a part of said public hospital a training school for nurses.
(RSMo 1939 § 15206) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13989; 1919 § 12623
